title: How to Set Up the Reviews Page
summary: How to create a dedicated Reviews page that shows all your guest reviews in a grid with Load More pagination.
content:
Your GAS website can have a dedicated Reviews page that displays all your reviews in a grid layout. Guests reach it via the 'View All Reviews' button on the homepage reviews slider.

The Reviews page is created automatically when your theme is first activated. If you do not see it, go to WordPress Admin > Pages and check for a page called 'Reviews' with the 'Reviews' template assigned.

WHAT THE REVIEWS PAGE SHOWS
- A hero banner with your reviews section title and subtitle
- A 3-column grid of review cards (2 columns on tablet, 1 on mobile)
- Each card shows: star rating, full review text, reviewer name, date and source channel
- A 'Load More' button that fetches the next batch of reviews without reloading the page
- Reviews are pulled from whichever source you have selected (Repuso, Hostaway, GAS Reviews App, or Manual)

CUSTOMISING THE BUTTON
In GAS Admin, go to Create Websites > Reviews tab. In the Styling section you will find:
- Button Color — the background colour of the 'View All Reviews' button
- Button Text Color — the text colour of the button
- View All Reviews Button Text — the label on the button, with translation tabs for EN, FR, ES, and NL

For example, you could change the button text to 'Read All Guest Reviews' in English and 'Voir Tous les Avis' in French.

COLOURS AND STYLING
The Reviews page inherits all colours from your reviews section settings:
- Background Colour — page background
- Text Colour — headings and review text
- Card Background — each review card
- Star Colour — the rating stars
- Button Color — the Load More button

HOW LOAD MORE WORKS
The page initially loads up to 24 reviews. If there are more available, a 'Load More Reviews' button appears at the bottom. Clicking it fetches the next 24 reviews and adds them to the grid with a smooth fade-in animation. The button disappears when there are no more reviews to load.

REVIEW SOURCES
The Reviews page works with all four review sources:
- Manual — shows the 3 manual reviews you entered in GAS Admin
- GAS Reviews App — fetches from the GAS reviews database
- Repuso Widget — fetches via the Repuso/ReviewsPlace API
- Hostaway Reviews — fetches reviews synced from Hostaway channels (Airbnb, Booking.com, etc.)

The source is set in the Reviews tab of your website editor. The Reviews page automatically uses whichever source is active.

TROUBLESHOOTING
- If the Reviews page is blank, check that you have selected a review source and that reviews exist
- If the page shows 'No reviews available yet', your chosen source has no reviews to display
- Make sure the Reviews page has the 'Reviews' template assigned in WordPress > Pages > Edit
- Clear your browser cache if changes do not appear immediately

Need help? Contact the GAS team at hello@gas.travel
